title: Zillow Group Reports Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Zillow Group Q4 2024 and Full-Year Financial Results. Q4 2024 Performance: Revenue Growth: Q4 revenue reached $554 million, up 17% year-over-year, exceeding company guidance by $21 million. The company stated: "Q4 revenue outperformed the residential real estate industry's year-over-year total transaction value growth." Segment Performance: For Sale Revenue: $428 million (+15% YoY). Residential: $387 million (+11% YoY). Mortgages: $41 million (+86% YoY, driven by 90% increase in loan originations to $923 million). Rentals Revenue: $116 million (+25% YoY), with multifamily growing 41% YoY. Profitability: GAAP net loss improved to $52 million (9% margin) from $73 million (15% margin) in Q4 2023. Full-Year 2024 Results: Annual Revenue: $2.236 billion, representing 15% year-over-year growth. Profitability Metrics: Net loss: $112 million (5% margin), improved from $158 million (8% margin) in 2023. Adjusted EBITDA: $498 million with 22% margin, up 200 basis points from 20% in 2023. Traffic: Monthly unique users reached 204 million (up 3% YoY) with 2.1 billion quarterly visits (up 3% YoY). CEO Jeremy Wacksman noted: "2024 was a remarkable year for Zillow...we expect to keep up our momentum in 2025."
